name: CHAI COLLECTION
pitch: A multi-faceted triangular crystal prism lens. Drags and shifts to refract coordinate space and disperse light into a colorful chromatic spectrum.

lifecycle.idle: Flat image surface with subtle light diffraction on outer boundaries
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, interactive prism lens drops onto image with spring bounce
lifecycle.buildUp: Dragging or moving lens refracts image coordinates and shears the view
lifecycle.peak: Rapid motion splits white light into rich RGB dispersion at facet boundaries
lifecycle.recovery: Prism lens scales down and lifts away, returning image to flat rest
